summary: Nested claude-cli headless dispatch stalled on a Bash permission prompt (checking the already-resolved Rust toolchain question) and returned without building anything. Built directly instead: 9-crate Cargo workspace + CI (fmt/clippy/cargo-deny/cargo-audit/build --locked/bench) + release skeleton. Verified: cargo build --locked && cargo fmt --check (T01's own verify command), clippy -D warnings, cargo deny check, cargo audit, bench --no-run all pass. PR: https://github.com/dermdunc/veilgremlin/pull/2 (branch gateway/run-20260714-T01, commit 25e3eb9). Full record in docs/decisions.md + docs/next-actions.md 2026-07-14 entries.
